CustomField.description: Manual level override for this year only. When set, it (not the Effective Level) is the donor's displayed level. Overrides do NOT carry forward — next year's summary inherits the earned/effective level, not the override. JSI-90 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Manually grant a level for this year. Does not carry into next year.
CustomField.label: Level Override
